title: Murder Drones Totem's
description: Totems are made from the series "Murder Drones". You can play with them at any time!
body:
![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BYCthTn2/images/0fade4d6cb9e77976b38437fa06c1b9d6cd74756.png)

In this resource pack you get more 5 totems of serial "Murder Drones".
It is recommended to download the latest version to use pack max.

 **To get the Dron totem, you need to change the totem to the Dron on the anvil.**

## Compatibility with the resource pack:

| Version             | Mods               | Result              |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| Vanilla            | -              | ❌             |
| [Forge](<https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/> 'HELLO,')            | [Optifine](<https://optifine.net/downloads> 'I')              | ✅             |
| [Fabric](<https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/> 'NOT')            | [CIT Resewn](<https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions>  'MURKA!')              | ✅             |

## List of totems:
 
[Doll](https://murder-drones.fandom.com/wiki/Doll);
[J](https://murder-drones.fandom.com/wiki/Serial_Designation_J);
[Khan](https://murder-drones.fandom.com/wiki/Khan_Doorman);
[Lizzy](https://murder-drones.fandom.com/wiki/Lizzy);
[N](https://murder-drones.fandom.com/wiki/Serial_Designation_N);
[Teacher](https://murder-drones.fandom.com/wiki/Teacher);
[Thad](https://murder-drones.fandom.com/wiki/Thad);
[Uzi](https://murder-drones.fandom.com/wiki/Uzi_Doorman);
[V](https://murder-drones.fandom.com/wiki/Serial_Designation_V).
